ocr_findings.description: Two 試験にはコレが出る! boxes with mascot icons are present on this page. Both are captured as plain markdown sections with bullet lists; icon images are dropped but text content is fully preserved.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 個人情報取扱事業者 definition, プライバシーマーク explanation, and 個人情報の取り扱い方 rules (p.78). Cleaned OCR accurately reproduces all body text including bold key terms. Both 試験にはコレが出る！ summary boxes are captured. No content loss detected. Label confirmed as content.
